papers.title: Synaptic Behaviors in a Commercial Bulk Silicon MOSFET at Cryogenic Temperature
papers.summary: To enable the rapid realization of large-scale integrated neuromorphic computing hardware, we experimentally characterize standard TSMC 65-nm bulk-silicon n-type MOSFETs, focusing on their synaptic behavior when operated under a floating-substrate condition down to 4 K. At 4 K, the device exhibits nearly symmetric potentiation and depression characteristics, achieved using 49 and 53 programming pulses of 100 ns width, respectively, with extracted nonlinearity factors of 0.35 and 0.49. Four well-defined current states are obtained using 500 ns programming pulses with different amplitudes. The device exhibits short-term plasticity; thereafter, the programmed states settle into stable current levels that remain clearly distinguishable for over ${10}^{{3}}{\,}\text {s}$ without refresh. In addition, the device shows small cycle-to-cycle variation over ${10}^{{3}}$ consecutive switching cycles. These results indicate a promising short-term solution for future cryogenic neuromorphic computing systems.
papers.abstract_cn: 为促进大规模集成神经形态计算硬件的快速实现，我们对标准 TSMC 65 nm 体硅 n 型 MOSFET 进行了实验表征，重点研究其在浮置衬底条件下工作至 4 K 时的突触行为。在 4 K 下，该器件表现出近似对称的增强和抑制特性，分别通过 49 个和 53 个脉宽为 100 ns 的编程脉冲实现，提取的非线性因子分别为 0.35 和 0.49。使用不同幅值的 500 ns 编程脉冲可获得四个定义良好的电流态。该器件表现出短时可塑性；随后，编程态稳定到清晰可区分的电流水平，并且在无需刷新的情况下可保持超过 10^3 s。此外，该器件在连续 10^3 次开关循环中表现出较小的循环间变化。这些结果表明，该器件有望成为未来低温神经形态计算系统的一种短期可行方案。
papers.abstract_zh: 为促进大规模集成神经形态计算硬件的快速实现，我们对标准 TSMC 65 nm 体硅 n 型 MOSFET 进行了实验表征，重点研究其在浮置衬底条件下工作至 4 K 时的突触行为。在 4 K 下，该器件表现出近似对称的增强和抑制特性，分别通过 49 个和 53 个脉宽为 100 ns 的编程脉冲实现，提取的非线性因子分别为 0.35 和 0.49。使用不同幅值的 500 ns 编程脉冲可获得四个定义良好的电流态。该器件表现出短时可塑性；随后，编程态稳定到清晰可区分的电流水平，并且在无需刷新的情况下可保持超过 10^3 s。此外，该器件在连续 10^3 次开关循环中表现出较小的循环间变化。这些结果表明，该器件有望成为未来低温神经形态计算系统的一种短期可行方案。

Context: Synaptic Behaviors in a Commercial Bulk Silicon MOSFET at Cryogenic Temperature.

papers.title: Dual-Gate InSnZnO Thin-Film Transistors With Heterogeneous High-k Gate Dielectric Layers
papers.summary: The dual-gate structure is an effective strategy for improving the electrical performance of amorphous oxide semiconductor (AOS) thin-film transistors (TFTs). However, the atomic layer deposition (ALD) process can degrade the performance of InSnZnO (ITZO) TFTs, thereby limiting the enhancement of the gate dielectric layers in ITZO TFTs. In this work, ITZO TFTs are passivated via one-step thermal oxidation of yttrium (Y), during which high-k Yttrium Oxide (Y 2 O ${}_{{3}}\text {)}$ is formed as the first top-gate dielectric layer. Subsequently, dual-gate ITZO TFTs with heterogeneous high-k gate dielectric layers are fabricated by depositing aluminum oxide (Al 2 O ${}_{{3}}\text {)}$ via ALD. The dual-gate TFTs exhibit a subthreshold swing ( SS ) of 65 mV dec ${}^{-{1}}$ in dual-gate enhanced gate control applications. The device designed with a high areal capacitance ratio ( ${C}_{\text {i}}\text {)}$ in the dual-gate structure achieves a coupling ratio ( $\gamma \text {)}$ of −6.78. The device exhibits excellent performance across various operating modes and shows great promise for applications in displays, sensing, and other fields.
papers.abstract_cn: 双栅结构是提升非晶氧化物半导体（amorphous oxide semiconductor, AOS）薄膜晶体管（thin-film transistors, TFTs）电学性能的一种有效策略。然而，原子层沉积（atomic layer deposition, ALD）工艺可能会劣化 InSnZnO（ITZO）TFT 的性能，从而限制 ITZO TFT 中栅介质层增强的效果。在本工作中，通过钇（Y）的一步热氧化对 ITZO TFT 进行钝化，在此过程中形成高 k 氧化钇（Y2O3）作为第一层顶栅介质。随后，通过 ALD 沉积氧化铝（Al2O3），制备了具有异质高 k 栅介质层的双栅 ITZO TFT。该双栅 TFT 在双栅增强栅控应用中表现出 65 mV dec^-1 的亚阈值摆幅（SS）。在双栅结构中设计为具有高面电容比（Ci）的器件实现了 -6.78 的耦合比（γ）。该器件在多种工作模式下均表现出优异性能，并在显示、传感及其他领域展现出很大应用前景。
papers.abstract_zh: 双栅结构是提升非晶氧化物半导体（amorphous oxide semiconductor, AOS）薄膜晶体管（thin-film transistors, TFTs）电学性能的一种有效策略。然而，原子层沉积（atomic layer deposition, ALD）工艺可能会劣化 InSnZnO（ITZO）TFT 的性能，从而限制 ITZO TFT 中栅介质层增强的效果。在本工作中，通过钇（Y）的一步热氧化对 ITZO TFT 进行钝化，在此过程中形成高 k 氧化钇（Y2O3）作为第一层顶栅介质。随后，通过 ALD 沉积氧化铝（Al2O3），制备了具有异质高 k 栅介质层的双栅 ITZO TFT。该双栅 TFT 在双栅增强栅控应用中表现出 65 mV dec^-1 的亚阈值摆幅（SS）。在双栅结构中设计为具有高面电容比（Ci）的器件实现了 -6.78 的耦合比（γ）。该器件在多种工作模式下均表现出优异性能，并在显示、传感及其他领域展现出很大应用前景。

Focus: 晶体管、介电材料、high-k 介质.
What to check: 性能提升、效率/耦合表现.
Context: Dual-Gate InSnZnO Thin-Film Transistors With Heterogeneous High-k Gate Dielectric Layers.

papers.title: 1.6-kV Vertical GaN Power MOSFETs With Hybrid Edge Termination
papers.summary: We demonstrate 1600 V vertical GaN-on-GaN trench MOSFETs employing hybrid edge termination (HET-MOSFET) that integrates nitrogen ion implantation (NIT) with mesa etching termination (MET). The NIT structure introduces a resistive region to alleviate electric field crowding at the device edges, while the MET structure suppresses potential leakage paths associated with the standalone NIT scheme. As a result, the breakdown voltage is enhanced from 400 V in the MET-MOSFET to 1628 V in the HET-MOSFET. Moreover, thanks to the tailored p-GaN channel layer design, the HET-MOSFET exhibits a low specific on-resistance (R ${}_{\mathbf {\text {ON},\text {sp}}}$ ) of 0.75 m $\Omega $ $\cdot $ cm 2 and a channel mobility ( $\mu _{\mathbf {\text {CH}}}$ ) of 151 cm 2 /V $\cdot $ s. These results highlight the feasibility of vertical GaN trench MOSFETs for high-voltage and high-power electronics.
papers.abstract_cn: 我们展示了采用混合边缘终端（hybrid edge termination, HET）的 1600 V 垂直 GaN-on-GaN 沟槽 MOSFET（HET-MOSFET），该结构集成了氮离子注入（nitrogen ion implantation, NIT）和台面刻蚀终端（mesa etching termination, MET）。NIT 结构引入电阻区域以缓解器件边缘的电场拥挤，而 MET 结构则抑制与单独 NIT 方案相关的潜在漏电路径。因此，击穿电压从 MET-MOSFET 中的 400 V 提高到 HET-MOSFET 中的 1628 V。此外，得益于定制的 p-GaN 沟道层设计，HET-MOSFET 表现出较低的比导通电阻（RON,sp）0.75 mΩ·cm2，以及 151 cm2/V·s 的沟道迁移率（μCH）。这些结果凸显了垂直 GaN 沟槽 MOSFET 用于高压和高功率电子器件的可行性。
papers.abstract_zh: 我们展示了采用混合边缘终端（hybrid edge termination, HET）的 1600 V 垂直 GaN-on-GaN 沟槽 MOSFET（HET-MOSFET），该结构集成了氮离子注入（nitrogen ion implantation, NIT）和台面刻蚀终端（mesa etching termination, MET）。NIT 结构引入电阻区域以缓解器件边缘的电场拥挤，而 MET 结构则抑制与单独 NIT 方案相关的潜在漏电路径。因此，击穿电压从 MET-MOSFET 中的 400 V 提高到 HET-MOSFET 中的 1628 V。此外，得益于定制的 p-GaN 沟道层设计，HET-MOSFET 表现出较低的比导通电阻（RON,sp）0.75 mΩ·cm2，以及 151 cm2/V·s 的沟道迁移率（μCH）。这些结果凸显了垂直 GaN 沟槽 MOSFET 用于高压和高功率电子器件的可行性。

Context: 1.6-kV Vertical GaN Power MOSFETs With Hybrid Edge Termination.

papers.title: Enhanced Thermal Management in GaN Superlattice Castellated Field Effect Transistors
papers.summary: AlGaN/GaN multi-channel Super Lattice Castellated Field Effect Transistors (SLCFETs) have shown great potential for next generation RF applications. We demonstrate a $2.44\times $ reduction in thermal resistance reduction in AlGaN/GaN multi-channel SLCFETs by replacing the standard AlGaN buffer with a high thermal conductivity AlN buffer layer and adding a poly-crystalline diamond overcoat layer. The thermal conductivity of each material in the device stack was measured using time-domain and frequency-domain thermoreflectance techniques, including ${223^{+21}_{-18}}$ W/m $\cdot $ K for $2.2~\mu $ m-thick AlN buffer versus ${38^{+5.5}_{- 5}}$ W/m $\cdot $ K for the reference $1.8~\mu $ m AlGaN buffer. Device thermal resistance was reduced from 29 mm°C/W to 11.9 mm°C/W by combining the AlN buffer and poly-crystalline diamond overcoat layer, determined using Raman thermography together with 3-D thermal simulation. The corresponding $2.44\times $ increase RF power density capability enabled by improved thermal management can unlock the next-generation ultra-high-power RF devices.
papers.abstract_cn: AlGaN/GaN 多沟道超晶格城堡式场效应晶体管（Super Lattice Castellated Field Effect Transistors, SLCFETs）已展现出面向下一代射频应用的巨大潜力。我们通过用高热导率 AlN 缓冲层替代标准 AlGaN 缓冲层，并添加多晶金刚石覆盖层，在 AlGaN/GaN 多沟道 SLCFET 中实现了热阻降低 2.44 倍。器件堆叠中每种材料的热导率均采用时域和频域热反射技术测量，其中 2.2 μm 厚 AlN 缓冲层的热导率为 223^{+21}_{-18} W/m·K，而参考 1.8 μm AlGaN 缓冲层的热导率为 38^{+5.5}_{-5} W/m·K。结合 AlN 缓冲层和多晶金刚石覆盖层后，利用 Raman 热成像和三维热仿真确定器件热阻从 29 mm°C/W 降至 11.9 mm°C/W。由改进热管理带来的相应 2.44 倍射频功率密度能力提升，有望释放下一代超高功率射频器件的潜力。
papers.abstract_zh: AlGaN/GaN 多沟道超晶格城堡式场效应晶体管（Super Lattice Castellated Field Effect Transistors, SLCFETs）已展现出面向下一代射频应用的巨大潜力。我们通过用高热导率 AlN 缓冲层替代标准 AlGaN 缓冲层，并添加多晶金刚石覆盖层，在 AlGaN/GaN 多沟道 SLCFET 中实现了热阻降低 2.44 倍。器件堆叠中每种材料的热导率均采用时域和频域热反射技术测量，其中 2.2 μm 厚 AlN 缓冲层的热导率为 223^{+21}_{-18} W/m·K，而参考 1.8 μm AlGaN 缓冲层的热导率为 38^{+5.5}_{-5} W/m·K。结合 AlN 缓冲层和多晶金刚石覆盖层后，利用 Raman 热成像和三维热仿真确定器件热阻从 29 mm°C/W 降至 11.9 mm°C/W。由改进热管理带来的相应 2.44 倍射频功率密度能力提升，有望释放下一代超高功率射频器件的潜力。

papers.title: Single-Layer Ferroelectric-Photosensitive Optoelectronic Transistor Enabling In-Sensor UV Fingerprint Recognition
papers.summary: Conventional ferroelectric optoelectronic devices suffer from low photocurrent and poor retention due to the physical separation between the ferroelectric and photoelectric conversion process. By incorporating PVN into the ferroelectric P(VDF-TrFE) layer, the composite not only provides a polarization field but also directly participates in light absorption and photoexcitation, significantly suppressing carrier recombination, fundamentally resolving the limitations of conventional ferroelectric photonic synapses. As a result, the fabricated transistor exhibits a large memory window of ~58 V and non-volatile retention exceeding $10^{{4}}$ s. Benefiting from the nonlinear and history-dependent dynamics originating from the ferroelectric photocarrier interaction, an in-sensor reservoir computing system is implemented for UV-excited fingerprint recognition, achieving high training and testing accuracies of 99.5% and 98.5%, respectively. This work unveils a ferroelectric-photosensitive synergy mechanism, offering a viable pathway toward energy-efficient neuromorphic visual hardware.
papers.abstract_cn: 传统铁电光电子器件由于铁电过程与光电转换过程在物理上分离，存在光电流低和保持性差的问题。通过将 PVN 引入铁电 P(VDF-TrFE) 层，该复合材料不仅提供极化场，还直接参与光吸收和光激发，从而显著抑制载流子复合，并从根本上解决传统铁电光突触的局限。因此，所制备晶体管表现出约 58 V 的大存储窗口，以及超过 10^4 s 的非易失保持特性。得益于源自铁电—光生载流子相互作用的非线性和历史依赖动力学，本文实现了一种传感器内储备池计算系统，用于紫外激发指纹识别，训练和测试准确率分别达到 99.5% 和 98.5%。本工作揭示了一种铁电—光敏协同机制，为面向能效型神经形态视觉硬件提供了一条可行路径。
papers.abstract_zh: 传统铁电光电子器件由于铁电过程与光电转换过程在物理上分离，存在光电流低和保持性差的问题。通过将 PVN 引入铁电 P(VDF-TrFE) 层，该复合材料不仅提供极化场，还直接参与光吸收和光激发，从而显著抑制载流子复合，并从根本上解决传统铁电光突触的局限。因此，所制备晶体管表现出约 58 V 的大存储窗口，以及超过 10^4 s 的非易失保持特性。得益于源自铁电—光生载流子相互作用的非线性和历史依赖动力学，本文实现了一种传感器内储备池计算系统，用于紫外激发指纹识别，训练和测试准确率分别达到 99.5% 和 98.5%。本工作揭示了一种铁电—光敏协同机制，为面向能效型神经形态视觉硬件提供了一条可行路径。

papers.title: Ultra-Steep-Slope and High-On/Off-Ratio P-Channel SnO Thin-Film Transistors via Monolithic Threshold-Switching Integration
papers.summary: As CMOS scaling approaches the angstrom regime, the 60 mV/dec subthreshold swing ( S S) limit of traditional field-effect transistors (FETs) severely impedes voltage scaling. Although threshold-switching FETs provide a viable pathway to steep-slope operation, their implementation in p-type oxide electronics remains largely unexplored. Here, we demonstrate an ultra-steep-slope p-channel tin monoxide (SnO) threshold-switching thin-film transistor (TS-TFT) enabled by the monolithic integration of a volatile Ag/Al 2 O 3 /HfO 2 /Pt threshold switch in series with the SnO channel. The Al 2 O 3 /HfO 2 bilayer is deliberately engineered to serve a dual function as both the threshold-switching medium and a robust back-channel passivation layer, enabling a compact process flow while suppressing the intrinsic leakage of SnO. As a result, the TS-TFT achieves an ultra-low minimum S S of 8 mV/dec, a high on/off ratio of ${1}.{78}\times {10}^{\mathbf {{8}}}$ , and an off-state leakage approaching the measurement noise floor (~100 fA). These results highlight threshold-switching integration as a viable strategy for ultra-low-power, all-oxide transparent electronics.
papers.abstract_cn: 随着 CMOS 缩放接近埃米尺度，传统场效应晶体管（FET）60 mV/dec 的亚阈值摆幅（SS）极限严重阻碍了电压缩放。尽管阈值开关 FET 为实现陡峭斜率工作提供了一条可行路径，但其在 p 型氧化物电子学中的实现仍基本未被探索。本文展示了一种超陡斜率 p 沟道一氧化锡（SnO）阈值开关薄膜晶体管（threshold-switching thin-film transistor, TS-TFT），该器件通过将易失性 Ag/Al2O3/HfO2/Pt 阈值开关与 SnO 沟道单片串联集成而实现。Al2O3/HfO2 双层被有意工程化设计为同时充当阈值开关介质和稳健的背沟道钝化层，从而在抑制 SnO 本征漏电的同时实现紧凑工艺流程。因此，该 TS-TFT 实现了 8 mV/dec 的超低最小 SS、1.78×10^8 的高开关比，以及接近测量噪声底（约 100 fA）的关态漏电。这些结果凸显了阈值开关集成作为超低功耗全氧化物透明电子学的一种可行策略。

papers.title: Experimental Demonstration of S-Band Gallium Nitride Heterojunction Bipolar Transistors With P out = 16.5 kW/cm 2
papers.summary: In this letter, we report the experimental demonstration of S-band AlGaN/GaN heterojunction bipolar transistors (HBTs) with an RF output power density of 16.5 kW/cm 2 and a power-added efficiency (PAE) of 6.7% at 2.4 GHz. This milestone achievement is enabled by: 1) a low base ohmic contact resistance ( $\textit {R}_{{B}-{M}}$ ) of ${2}.{17}\times {10} ^{-{3}} \Omega \cdot $ cm 2 enabled on the etch-damage-free selective-area-grown (SAG) emitter platform; 2) a high-aspect-ratio emitter ( $3\times 80~\mu $ m 2 ) that reduces the emitter contact resistance ( $\textit {R}_{{E}-{M}}$ ), thereby minimizing the on-resistance and enhancing power output capability; and 3) reduction of the extrinsic base resistance ( $\textit {R}_{\textit {Bx}}$ ) by down scaling. Benefiting from the reduction of these parasitic resistances, $\textit {f}_{T}/\textit {f}_{\textit {max}}$ values of 30.5/4.19 GHz and 18.2/7.01 GHz were achieved for devices with base contact-emitter space $\textit {W}_{\textit {BE}} =2$ and $1~\mu $ m, respectively. Notably, the $\textit {f}_{T} =30.5$ GHz and $\textit {f}_{\textit {max}} =7.01$ GHz are, to the best of knowledge, the highest reported to date for GaN HBTs. Further scaling is expected to improve $\textit {f}_{\textit {max}}$ and significantly enhance PAE, bringing high-power, high-efficiency S-band power amplifiers based on GaN HBTs within imminent reach.
papers.abstract_cn: 在本文中，我们报道了 S 波段 AlGaN/GaN 异质结双极晶体管（heterojunction bipolar transistors, HBTs）的实验展示，其在 2.4 GHz 下实现了 16.5 kW/cm2 的射频输出功率密度和 6.7% 的功率附加效率（power-added efficiency, PAE）。这一里程碑式成果得益于：1）在无刻蚀损伤的选择区域生长（selective-area-grown, SAG）发射极平台上实现了 2.17×10^-3 Ω·cm2 的低基极欧姆接触电阻（RB-M）；2）采用高深宽比发射极（3×80 μm2）以降低发射极接触电阻（RE-M），从而最小化导通电阻并提升功率输出能力；以及 3）通过尺寸缩小降低外延基区电阻（RBx）。受益于这些寄生电阻的降低，对于基极接触—发射极间距 WBE 分别为 2 μm 和 1 μm 的器件，实现了 30.5/4.19 GHz 和 18.2/7.01 GHz 的 fT/fmax。值得注意的是，据我们所知，fT = 30.5 GHz 和 fmax = 7.01 GHz 是目前 GaN HBT 报道中的最高值。进一步缩放预计将提升 fmax 并显著提高 PAE，使基于 GaN HBT 的高功率、高效率 S 波段功率放大器即将成为现实。
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们报道了 S 波段 AlGaN/GaN 异质结双极晶体管（heterojunction bipolar transistors, HBTs）的实验展示，其在 2.4 GHz 下实现了 16.5 kW/cm2 的射频输出功率密度和 6.7% 的功率附加效率（power-added efficiency, PAE）。这一里程碑式成果得益于：1）在无刻蚀损伤的选择区域生长（selective-area-grown, SAG）发射极平台上实现了 2.17×10^-3 Ω·cm2 的低基极欧姆接触电阻（RB-M）；2）采用高深宽比发射极（3×80 μm2）以降低发射极接触电阻（RE-M），从而最小化导通电阻并提升功率输出能力；以及 3）通过尺寸缩小降低外延基区电阻（RBx）。受益于这些寄生电阻的降低，对于基极接触—发射极间距 WBE 分别为 2 μm 和 1 μm 的器件，实现了 30.5/4.19 GHz 和 18.2/7.01 GHz 的 fT/fmax。值得注意的是，据我们所知，fT = 30.5 GHz 和 fmax = 7.01 GHz 是目前 GaN HBT 报道中的最高值。进一步缩放预计将提升 fmax 并显著提高 PAE，使基于 GaN HBT 的高功率、高效率 S 波段功率放大器即将成为现实。

papers.title: A Compact Model of Moiré Synaptic Transistor
papers.summary: Moiré Synaptic Transistors (MSTs) based on asymmetric two-dimensional heterostructures have recently been experimentally demonstrated as an emerging device platform for ultra-low-power, non-volatile, and biorealistic neuromorphic computing. In this Letter, we develop a compact model for the MST based on its device physics. The model combines a gate electrostatics framework that self-consistently accounts for both localized moiré electrons at the heterointerface and free carriers in the channel with an ambipolar transport model for the graphene channel of the transistor. The model reproduces key experimentally observed neuromorphic device characteristics, including ratchet-like DC hysteretic current-voltage relation and static synaptic threshold sliding enabled by dual-gate operation. The asymmetric moiré heterostructure under dual-gate control supports robust electronic ratchet states, giving rise to hysteretic, non-volatile I–V characteristics when one gate is swept, with the features tunable by the other gate. By explicitly capturing the electrostatic screening and charge dynamics associated with the localized moiré electron system, the model provides physical insight into the operating mechanisms of MSTs.
papers.abstract_cn: 基于非对称二维异质结构的莫尔突触晶体管（Moiré Synaptic Transistors, MSTs）近期已在实验上被证明是一种新兴器件平台，可用于超低功耗、非易失且生物真实感的神经形态计算。在本文中，我们基于 MST 的器件物理建立了一个紧凑模型。该模型结合了一个栅极静电框架和一个用于晶体管石墨烯沟道的双极性输运模型；前者自洽地考虑了异质界面处的局域莫尔电子以及沟道中的自由载流子。该模型再现了实验观察到的关键神经形态器件特性，包括类似棘轮的直流滞回血流—电压关系，以及由双栅操作实现的静态突触阈值滑移。在双栅控制下，非对称莫尔异质结构支持稳健的电子棘轮态，当扫描一个栅极时会产生滞回、非易失 I–V 特性，而这些特征可由另一个栅极调节。通过显式捕捉与局域莫尔电子体系相关的静电屏蔽和电荷动力学，该模型为 MST 的工作机制提供了物理认识。
papers.abstract_zh: 基于非对称二维异质结构的莫尔突触晶体管（Moiré Synaptic Transistors, MSTs）近期已在实验上被证明是一种新兴器件平台，可用于超低功耗、非易失且生物真实感的神经形态计算。在本文中，我们基于 MST 的器件物理建立了一个紧凑模型。该模型结合了一个栅极静电框架和一个用于晶体管石墨烯沟道的双极性输运模型；前者自洽地考虑了异质界面处的局域莫尔电子以及沟道中的自由载流子。该模型再现了实验观察到的关键神经形态器件特性，包括类似棘轮的直流滞回血流—电压关系，以及由双栅操作实现的静态突触阈值滑移。在双栅控制下，非对称莫尔异质结构支持稳健的电子棘轮态，当扫描一个栅极时会产生滞回、非易失 I–V 特性，而这些特征可由另一个栅极调节。通过显式捕捉与局域莫尔电子体系相关的静电屏蔽和电荷动力学，该模型为 MST 的工作机制提供了物理认识。
